Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories (Proposed Order)
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances, The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
